name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

<!--
Describe the situation you're trying to solve. The "why" is more important than the "what".
Example: "I'm using Vedana for X. Right now I have to do Y, which is painful because Z."
-->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like to see. API shape, UX, config knob — whatever applies. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to solve this. Workarounds you tried. Why they don't work / aren't enough. -->

## Scope

<!--
Help us scope this:
- Which package(s) would change? (jims-core, vedana-core, vedana-etl, vedana-backoffice, …)
- Is this backwards-compatible, or would it require a breaking change?
- Are you willing to contribute the PR?
-->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to similar features in other tools, screenshots, sketches, references. -->
